title: Honeycomb
excerpt: Ingredients 200 g caster sugar 75 g honey 10 g bicarbonate of soda 45 ml water Method Melt the caster sugar and honey in a pot on the stove together with the water. It must not boil until all the sugar has dissolved. Turn up the heat and let it …
html:
Ingredients

  • 200 g caster sugar
  • 75 g honey
  • 10 g bicarbonate of soda
  • 45 ml water

Method

  1. Melt the caster sugar and honey in a pot on the stove together with the water. It must not boil until all the sugar has dissolved.
  2. Turn up the heat and let it turn a nice golden brown colour
  3. Remove from the heat and quickly stir in the bicarbonate of soda with a wooden spoon
  4. Pour out onto a piece of tinfoil that has been sprayed.
